sections.paragraph:
Original: חרס

Transliteration: cheres

Phonetic: kheh'-res

BDB Definition:

Heres = "the sun"
  1. a mountain inhabited by Amorites in Moab; the place where Gideon turned back from chasing the Midianites

Origin: the same as H2775

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
